issues_unfixed.description: Non-junction entities RecipeStep (E-007) and OrderItem (E-012) have no dedicated endpoints
issues_unfixed.details: RecipeStep (E-007) is managed via Recipe endpoints (EP-022 POST /api/recipes accepts steps array, EP-023 PATCH /api/recipes/:id accepts steps array replacement). OrderItem (E-012) is managed via Order endpoints (EP-037 POST /api/orders accepts items array, EP-038 POST /api/orders/:id/add-items adds items). These are child entities managed through their parent's CRUD operations, which is a valid API design pattern. No separate endpoints needed.
issues_unfixed.rationale: These entities are embedded sub-resources managed through parent endpoints. This is intentional API design, not an omission. Reporting as medium severity because the pattern is valid but worth noting.

issues_unfixed.description: Stock deduction timing decision appears in 3 files: D-001 (entities.json), D-030 (api-design.json), D-064 (architecture.json)
issues_unfixed.details: All three decisions address the same topic (when to deduct inventory stock) and all three are consistent (deduct at order submission/confirmation with reversal on cancel/void). However, having the same business decision in 3 separate files creates maintenance risk. Recommend the Lead consolidate into a single authoritative decision with cross-references.
issues_unfixed.rationale: The decisions are consistent but duplicated across agent outputs. This requires Lead coordination to merge, not a mechanical fix.

summary: V2 validation PASSED with 16/17 checks clean. All 74 endpoints across 12 domain split files are structurally valid. EP-xxx IDs are sequential (EP-001 to EP-074) with no gaps or duplicates. All endpoints have related_entity and related_entity_id fields that match entities.json exactly. All endpoints have non-empty source_features. Auth type (local-auth-hash) is consistent between api-design.json and tech-stack.json. Decision IDs (D-030 to D-033) are within the valid D-030-049 range. No method-path inconsistencies found. All 10 key_signals domain_groups are represented in domain_index (plus 2 additional domains: user-management and sync, which are valid additions). Base path (/api) is present. No placeholder text found. Summary counts (by_method, by_domain, total_endpoints) all match actual endpoint counts exactly. All must-have features with business_rules have at least one endpoint referencing them. Two non-blocking issues reported: (1) RecipeStep and OrderItem entities have no dedicated endpoints but are managed via parent endpoints (valid pattern), (2) stock deduction timing decision is duplicated across 3 files but consistently resolved.

V2-A1.name: EP-xxx IDs sequential
V2-A1.details: 74 endpoints, EP-001 to EP-074, sequential with no gaps or duplicates

V2-A2.name: Every endpoint has related_entity
V2-A2.details: All 74 endpoints have non-empty related_entity field

V2-A3.name: Every endpoint has related_entity_id matching entities.json
V2-A3.details: All related_entity_id values match the correct E-xxx ID for their named entity in entities.json

V2-A4.name: source_features non-empty
V2-A4.details: All 74 endpoints have at least 1 entry in source_features[]

V2-A6.name: D-xxx IDs in range D-030 to D-049
V2-A6.details: 4 decisions: D-030, D-031, D-032, D-033 — all within valid range

V2-A7.name: Method-path consistency
V2-A7.details: No GET endpoints with 'create' or 'add' in path. No POST endpoints for read-only operations.

V2-A8.name: Domain groups present
V2-A8.details: All 10 key_signals.domain_groups are present in domain_index. 2 additional domains (user-management, sync) are valid additions that extend auth and system functionality.

V2-A10.name: No placeholder text
V2-A10.details: Scanned all 13 files for TODO, TBD, FIXME, placeholder, '...' — none found

V2-B1.name: Every non-junction entity has at least 1 endpoint
V2-B1.details: RecipeStep (E-007) and OrderItem (E-012) have no dedicated endpoints. RecipeStep is managed via Recipe CRUD (EP-022, EP-023 accept steps arrays). OrderItem is managed via Order CRUD (EP-037, EP-038 accept items arrays). This is a valid embedded sub-resource pattern. RecipeIngredient (E-006) is junction type so excluded from this check but also managed via Recipe endpoints.

V2-B2.name: related_entity names match entities.json exactly
V2-B2.details: All 74 endpoint related_entity values are exact case-sensitive matches to entity names in entities.json

V2-B3.name: Business rules from must-have features
V2-B3.details: All 12 must-have features (F-001 through F-009, F-015 through F-017) have at least 1 endpoint with matching source_features reference. Business rules are represented in endpoint business_rules arrays.

V2-C1.name: by_method counts
V2-C1.details: Summary says GET:33, POST:21, PATCH:14, DELETE:6. Actual counts match exactly.

V2-C2.name: by_domain counts
V2-C2.details: All 12 domain counts in summary.by_domain match actual endpoint counts per split file

V2-C3.name: total_endpoints count
V2-C3.details: Summary says 74, actual count is 74. Match.

V2-D1.name: Duplicate decision detection
V2-D1.details: 1 duplicate topic detected: stock deduction timing addressed by D-001 (entities), D-030 (api-design), and D-064 (architecture). All 3 are consistent (deduct at order submission with reversal). Recommend Lead consolidation.
